games.name: BARK
games.tagline: ONE BIG MAP, ONE SMALL COMMUNITY
games.shortDesc: One big map, one small community. Enter Bark — a world of the Trelatves. Hang out with others, play at the arcade, and enjoy the world of Bark!
games.fullDesc: Enter Bark, a world of the Trelatves. In Bark, you hang out with others, play at the new arcade, and enjoy the world of Bark!

reviews.author: StarProgramPillow
reviews.text: Really good game! Can't wait for the rat DLC!

reviews.author: llamaboi1
reviews.text: This game is so amazing 👍 if you don't like this, you're a stinky head

games.name: Glorp!
games.shortDesc: In this game, you play as a rat. you can travel through sewers, jam out to music, and most importantly, have fun!
games.fullDesc: In this game, you play as a rat. there are currently 6 maps! we have a plethora of different cosmetics. its pretty much your common vr game!

reviews.author: King_chickennugget
reviews.text: I bought a house owners really nice I’m going to sleep in my new house

reviews.author: SUSchunks
reviews.text: This game is delicious anyone who finds this game should get it Pls do it’s a very yummy game! 🤤😋

reviews.author: Bumstronaut
reviews.text: This game is actually a w, So good am I right

games.name: Parakeet Park
games.shortDesc: Snow has fallen down in Parakeet Park! Hop on down and chill out with your friends! Vibe to the music, Dance with the parakeets around the town that grows almost every update! Stay warm out there!
games.fullDesc: Snow has fallen down in Parakeet Park! Hop on down and chill out with up to 19 your friends! Vibe to the holiday music, Go ice skating in the middle of the town, Dance with the parakeets around the town that grows almost every update! The world is ever changing, and you'll be able to meet new NPCs throughout the town! Stay warm out there, for it is chilly!

games.name: The Testevator
games.shortDesc: Explore rooms using a magic elevator, Find hidden easter eggs, Get weirdly confused by dancing frogs, And have fun!
games.fullDesc: Explore rooms using a magic elevator, Find hidden easter eggs, Get weirdly confused by dancing frogs,  Customize your body,  Laugh at strange things, And have fun!

siteText.extrasForecastDisclaimer: Forecast uses the same algorithm as the in-game system. No manual overrides are shown on this page.
